TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Lu-sen-paw, title = Lu-sen-paw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lu-sen-paw} }

S.FORM: == kakaliman == Lu-sen-pawÁõßś£ģŚ†° Lu-sen-paw-se "Lu-sen-paw-se a kamu", nu Áõßś£ģŚ†° hungtiay angangan a tukay, nutimulan kuyni a kanatal, uyni a kanatal u sakatuuday a tademaw nu tukay. Lu-sen-paw u kakitaanay a tukuy nu kitakit, macakat mala gingjku tu, kezay atu angangan nu sakawawan. Lu-sen-paw nu Ow-mung yadahay kuni patizeng tu sakawan a sakaput nu kitizaan, pasu Ow-cow a huing, Ow-cow kingsaging, Ow-cow mikadumay a gingku, u micalukay tu Pi-lis-pu-lu-say-al atuBa-kow-s-la-te-la-s-paw zikuzay a "Ow-mung nu tusaay angangan nu tukay". likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Lu-sen-paw-se a likisi i cong-s-ci- hawsa Lu-sen-paw-se malingatu a misakapah patizeng. mamin mapatizeng ku sicabengay a luma' zikuz, capiay malingatu haymaw sa malahad, mala niyazu'tu. Lu-sen-paw-se tini i kahenulan a kitizaan mingayaw, Ba-kow, Te-kow atu He-lan miazih amin, Lu-sen-paw-se hina pabeli tu zumaay a kanatal. 19 se-ci, Lu-sen-paw malingatu mala teked misakaku ku kanatal u He-la nu pulung hungtuay a kanatal tu kapulungan a sakaput, katukuh Pi-li-s a misateked, Lu-sen-paw kya miliyas tu pikuwan nu He-lan. kanahatu Lu-sen-paw musakamu acaay pisakanih tu cima, nika I 20 a s-ci, u Lu-sen-paw kinapina madebung nu Te-kow, saayaway kitakit a ngangayaw hawsa 1914 a mihca 8 a bulad 2 a demiad, Te-i-ce hungti a kanatal mikawaw tu S-li-ben pabalucu' amikalamkam micalap tu Lu-sen-paw a midebung tu Pi-li-s atu Ba-kow, miwawah tu satip a ngangayaw, sakatusa nu tabakiay a ngangayaw nu kitakit, iza kucacay a bataan ku ci subayuay a hitay nu Lu-sen-paw zayhan Na-suy Te-kow midebung tu Pi-li-s atu Ba-kow maalaw, mapacici mala milihiza mingayaw tu sakaput a kanatal, saaca i pingayawan nu Te-kow mialaes, mala sakatusa nu nayay ku madukaay atu mapatayay nu kangangayaw nu kanatal. sakatusaa zikez nu kitakit nu satabakiay a ngangayaw, Lu-sen-paw caatu kahizasa, mala nu Pey-ye atu Ow-mung nu patizengay a sakaput nu kanatal. Lu-sen-paw tiin i tukus nu Si-ow, u lala' talakaw ku saamisan i sasa ku nutimulan, nuwalian belaw nu Tekow,nutimulan mitules tu Ba-kow, saamisan atu satipan malecad mitules tu Pi-li-s. nuamisan u Ya-al-tin talakaw ku lala', macebed ku kilakilangan, nutimula u adidi'ay a buyu'an. diheku ku demiad, tungusay u dehkuay a bayu, salungan ku hekal. angangan a tukuy nu Lu-sen-paw singagan tu "balu tukay". yadah ku muki ba'tu. itini angagan nu kangagayawan a kitizaay nu cung-s-ci. satalakaway a buyu' u Ke-ney-bu, u talakaw pakala tu 560 a depah. pikatalakawan tu 1 mi tu, u Pu-ke-la-ze, u Pu-ke-pu-la-ce-san hina mapatelac hinisa u satalakaway ku Lu-sen-paw sa. Lu-sen-paw a saculilan angangan miida tu zazan, silamalay atu hikuki, atu zuma nu miculu'ay a hikuki, malahad ku calay a zazan, taneng patayza kasa belaw a kanatal, labu iza ku sacacayay a pahikukian Lu-sen-paw a pahikukian. Lu-sen-paw i kitakit u sakatusa a kakitaan nu kanatal, u nipicakay tu mayasuyay niasipan palalecad tu tademaw tu GDP k 2021 a mihcaan tu 122,740 Amilika a kalisiw. makay 1999 a mihcaan, Lu-sen-paw nu tungusay Ow kalisiw a kitizaan. Lu-sen-paw a kezay iayaw angangan u kusi, ayza u Lu-sen-paw i kitakit u satabakiay a kitizaan nu misiwbayay. Lu-sen-paw nu zuma kitizaan nu Ow a kalisiw. Lu-sen-paw kitizaan nu Ow a kalisiw labu nu kahenulan nu tekeday a ginku atu uiza dada' i Amilika tu hamin nu kitakit tu sakatus a kakaduman a giku.
S.PHON: == kakar~…ĺiman == r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw*** r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw-s…ô "r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw-s…ô a kamu", nu *** ńßuŇčtiaj aŇčaŇčan a tukaj, nutimur~…ĺan kujni a kanatar~…ĺ, ujni a kanatar~…ĺ u sakatuudaj a tad…ômaw nu tukaj. r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw u kakitaanaj a tukuj nu kitakit, ma ¶akat mar~…ĺa giŇčjku tu, k…ôzaj atu aŇčaŇčan nu sakawawan. r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw nu ow-muŇč jadańßaj kuni patiz…ôŇč tu sakawan a sakaput nu kitizaan, pasu ow- ¶ow a ńßuiŇč, ow- ¶ow kiŇčsagiŇč, ow- ¶ow mikadumaj a giŇčku, u mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj tu pi-r~…ĺis-pu-r~…ĺu-saj-ar~…ĺ atuba-kow-s-r~…ĺa-t…ô-r~…ĺa-s-paw zikuzaj a "ow-muŇč nu tusaaj aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj". r~…ĺikisi** r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw-s…ô a r~…ĺikisi i ¶oŇč-s- ¶i- ńßawsa r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw-s…ô mar~…ĺiŇčatu a misakapańß patiz…ôŇč. mamin mapatiz…ôŇč ku si ¶ab…ôŇčaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° zikuz, ¶apiaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu ńßajmaw sa mar~…ĺańßad, mar~…ĺa nijazu Ē~ °tu. r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw-s…ô tini i kańß…ônur~…ĺan a kitizaan miŇčajaw, ba-kow, t…ô-kow atu ńß…ô-r~…ĺan miazińß amin, r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw-s…ô ńßina pab…ôr~…ĺi tu zumaaj a kanatar~…ĺ. ** s…ô- ¶i, r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw mar~…ĺiŇčatu mar~…ĺa t…ôk…ôd misakaku ku kanatar~…ĺ u ńß…ô-r~…ĺa nu pur~…ĺuŇč ńßuŇčtuaj a kanatar~…ĺ tu kapur~…ĺuŇčan a sakaput, katukuńß pi-r~…ĺi-s a misat…ôk…ôd, r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw kja mir~…ĺijas tu pikuwan nu ńß…ô-r~…ĺan. kanańßatu r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw musakamu a ¶aaj pisakanińß tu ¶ima, nika i ** a s- ¶i, u r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw kinapina mad…ôbuŇč nu t…ô-kow, saajawaj kitakit a ŇčaŇčajaw ńßawsa **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, t…ô-i- ¶…ô ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ mikawaw tu s-r~…ĺi-b…ôn pabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° amikar~…ĺamkam mi ¶ar~…ĺap tu r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw a mid…ôbuŇč tu pi-r~…ĺi-s atu ba-kow, miwawańß tu satip a ŇčaŇčajaw, sakatusa nu tabakiaj a ŇčaŇčajaw nu kitakit, iza ku ¶a ¶aj a bataan ku ¶i subajuaj a ńßitaj nu r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw zajńßan na-suj t…ô-kow mid…ôbuŇč tu pi-r~…ĺi-s atu ba-kow maar~…ĺaw, mapa ¶i ¶i mar~…ĺa mir~…ĺińßiza miŇčajaw tu sakaput a kanatar~…ĺ, saa ¶a i piŇčajawan nu t…ô-kow miar~…ĺa…ôs, mar~…ĺa sakatusa nu najaj ku madukaaj atu mapatajaj nu kaŇčaŇčajaw nu kanatar~…ĺ. sakatusaa zik…ôz nu kitakit nu satabakiaj a ŇčaŇčajaw, r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw ¶aatu kańßizasa, mar~…ĺa nu p…ô-j…ô atu ow-muŇč nu patiz…ôŇčaj a sakaput nu kanatar~…ĺ. r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw tiin i tukus nu si-ow, u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tar~…ĺakaw ku saamisan i sasa ku nutimur~…ĺan, nuwar~…ĺian b…ôr~…ĺaw nu t…ôkow,nutimur~…ĺan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu ba-kow, saamisan atu satipan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu pi-r~…ĺi-s. nuamisan u ja-ar~…ĺ-tin tar~…ĺakaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, ma ¶…ôb…ôd ku kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, nutimur~…ĺa u adidi Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ °an. dińß…ôku ku d…ômiad, tuŇčusaj u d…ôńßkuaj a baju, sar~…ĺuŇčan ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. aŇčaŇčan a tukuj nu r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw siŇčagan tu "bar~…ĺu tukaj". jadańß ku muki ba Ē~ °tu. itini aŇčagan nu kaŇčagajawan a kitizaaj nu ¶uŇč-s- ¶i. satar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° u k…ô-n…ô-bu, u tar~…ĺakaw pakar~…ĺa tu *** a d…ôpańß. pikatar~…ĺakawan tu * mi tu, u pu-k…ô-r~…ĺa-z…ô, u pu-k…ô-pu-r~…ĺa- ¶…ô-san ńßina mapat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ńßinisa u satar~…ĺakawaj ku r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw sa. r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan aŇčaŇčan miida tu zazan, sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj atu ńßikuki, atu zuma nu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a ńßikuki, mar~…ĺańßad ku ¶ar~…ĺaj a zazan, tan…ôŇč patajza kasa b…ôr~…ĺaw a kanatar~…ĺ, r~…ĺabu iza ku sa ¶a ¶ajaj a pańßikukian r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw a pańßikukian. r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw i kitakit u sakatusa a kakitaan nu kanatar~…ĺ, u nipi ¶akaj tu majasujaj niasipan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tad…ômaw tu gdp k **** a mińß ¶aan tu ***,*** amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw. makaj **** a mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw nu tuŇčusaj ow kar~…ĺisiw a kitizaan. r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw a k…ôzaj iajaw aŇčaŇčan u kusi, ajza u r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw i kitakit u satabakiaj a kitizaan nu misiwbajaj. r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw nu zuma kitizaan nu ow a kar~…ĺisiw. r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw kitizaan nu ow a kar~…ĺisiw r~…ĺabu nu kańß…ônur~…ĺan nu t…ôk…ôdaj a ginku atu uiza dada Ē~ ° i amir~…ĺika tu ńßamin nu kitakit tu sakatus a kakaduman a giku.
S.FORM: == kakaliman == Lu-sen-pawÁõßś£ģŚ†° Lu-sen-paw-se "Lu-sen-paw-se a kamu", nu Áõßś£ģŚ†° hungtiay angangan a tukay, nutimulan kuyni a kanatal, uyni a kanatal u sakatuuday a tademaw nu tukay. Lu-sen-paw u kakitaanay a tukuy nu kitakit, macakat mala gingjku tu, kezay atu angangan nu sakawawan. Lu-sen-paw nu Ow-mung yadahay kuni patizeng tu sakawan a sakaput nu kitizaan, pasu Ow-cow a huing, Ow-cow kingsaging, Ow-cow mikadumay a gingku, u micalukay tu Pi-lis-pu-lu-say-al atuBa-kow-s-la-te-la-s-paw zikuzay a "Ow-mung nu tusaay angangan nu tukay". likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Lu-sen-paw-se a likisi i cong-s-ci- hawsa Lu-sen-paw-se malingatu a misakapah patizeng. mamin mapatizeng ku sicabengay a luma' zikuz, capiay malingatu haymaw sa malahad, mala niyazu'tu. Lu-sen-paw-se tini i kahenulan a kitizaan mingayaw, Ba-kow, Te-kow atu He-lan miazih amin, Lu-sen-paw-se hina pabeli tu zumaay a kanatal. 19 se-ci, Lu-sen-paw malingatu mala teked misakaku ku kanatal u He-la nu pulung hungtuay a kanatal tu kapulungan a sakaput, katukuh Pi-li-s a misateked, Lu-sen-paw kya miliyas tu pikuwan nu He-lan. kanahatu Lu-sen-paw musakamu acaay pisakanih tu cima, nika I 20 a s-ci, u Lu-sen-paw kinapina madebung nu Te-kow, saayaway kitakit a ngangayaw hawsa 1914 a mihca 8 a bulad 2 a demiad, Te-i-ce hungti a kanatal mikawaw tu S-li-ben pabalucu' amikalamkam micalap tu Lu-sen-paw a midebung tu Pi-li-s atu Ba-kow, miwawah tu satip a ngangayaw, sakatusa nu tabakiay a ngangayaw nu kitakit, iza kucacay a bataan ku ci subayuay a hitay nu Lu-sen-paw zayhan Na-suy Te-kow midebung tu Pi-li-s atu Ba-kow maalaw, mapacici mala milihiza mingayaw tu sakaput a kanatal, saaca i pingayawan nu Te-kow mialaes, mala sakatusa nu nayay ku madukaay atu mapatayay nu kangangayaw nu kanatal. sakatusaa zikez nu kitakit nu satabakiay a ngangayaw, Lu-sen-paw caatu kahizasa, mala nu Pey-ye atu Ow-mung nu patizengay a sakaput nu kanatal. Lu-sen-paw tiin i tukus nu Si-ow, u lala' talakaw ku saamisan i sasa ku nutimulan, nuwalian belaw nu Tekow,nutimulan mitules tu Ba-kow, saamisan atu satipan malecad mitules tu Pi-li-s. nuamisan u Ya-al-tin talakaw ku lala', macebed ku kilakilangan, nutimula u adidi'ay a buyu'an. diheku ku demiad, tungusay u dehkuay a bayu, salungan ku hekal. angangan a tukuy nu Lu-sen-paw singagan tu "balu tukay". yadah ku muki ba'tu. itini angagan nu kangagayawan a kitizaay nu cung-s-ci. satalakaway a buyu' u Ke-ney-bu, u talakaw pakala tu 560 a depah. pikatalakawan tu 1 mi tu, u Pu-ke-la-ze, u Pu-ke-pu-la-ce-san hina mapatelac hinisa u satalakaway ku Lu-sen-paw sa. Lu-sen-paw a saculilan angangan miida tu zazan, silamalay atu hikuki, atu zuma nu miculu'ay a hikuki, malahad ku calay a zazan, taneng patayza kasa belaw a kanatal, labu iza ku sacacayay a pahikukian Lu-sen-paw a pahikukian. Lu-sen-paw i kitakit u sakatusa a kakitaan nu kanatal, u nipicakay tu mayasuyay niasipan palalecad tu tademaw tu GDP k 2021 a mihcaan tu 122,740 Amilika a kalisiw. makay 1999 a mihcaan, Lu-sen-paw nu tungusay Ow kalisiw a kitizaan. Lu-sen-paw a kezay iayaw angangan u kusi, ayza u Lu-sen-paw i kitakit u satabakiay a kitizaan nu misiwbayay. Lu-sen-paw nu zuma kitizaan nu Ow a kalisiw. Lu-sen-paw kitizaan nu Ow a kalisiw labu nu kahenulan nu tekeday a ginku atu uiza dada' i Amilika tu hamin nu kitakit tu sakatus a kakaduman a giku.

tad…ômaw nu tukaj. r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw u kakitaanaj a tukuj nu kitakit, ma ¶akat mar~…ĺa giŇčjku tu, k…ôzaj atu aŇčaŇčan nu sakawawan. r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw nu ow-muŇč jadańßaj kuni patiz…ôŇč tu sakawan a sakaput nu kitizaan, pasu ow- ¶ow a ńßuiŇč, ow- ¶ow kiŇčsagiŇč, ow- ¶ow mikadumaj a giŇčku, u mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj tu pi-r~…ĺis-pu-r~…ĺu-saj-ar~…ĺ atuba-kow-s-r~…ĺa-t…ô-r~…ĺa-s-paw zikuzaj a "ow-muŇč nu tusaaj aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj". r~…ĺikisi** r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw-s…ô a r~…ĺikisi i ¶oŇč-s- ¶i- ńßawsa r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw-s…ô mar~…ĺiŇčatu a misakapańß patiz…ôŇč. mamin mapatiz…ôŇč ku si ¶ab…ôŇčaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° zikuz, nu ¶uŇč-s- ¶i. satar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° u k…ô-n…ô-bu, u tar~…ĺakaw pakar~…ĺa tu *** a d…ôpańß. pikatar~…ĺakawan tu * mi tu, u pu-k…ô-r~…ĺa-z…ô, u pu-k…ô-pu-r~…ĺa- ¶…ô-san ńßina mapat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ńßinisa u satar~…ĺakawaj ku r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw sa. r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan aŇčaŇčan miida tu zazan, sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj atu ńßikuki, atu zuma nu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a ńßikuki, mar~…ĺańßad ku ¶ar~…ĺaj a zazan, tan…ôŇč patajza kasa b…ôr~…ĺaw a kanatar~…ĺ, r~…ĺabu iza ku sa ¶a ¶ajaj a pańßikukian r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw a pańßikukian. r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw i kitakit u sakatusa a kakitaan nu kanatar~…ĺ, u nipi ¶akaj tu majasujaj niasipan par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tad…ômaw tu gdp k **** a mińß ¶aan tu ***,*** amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw. makaj **** a mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw nu tuŇčusaj ow kar~…ĺisiw a kitizaan. r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw a k…ôzaj iajaw aŇčaŇčan u kusi, ajza u r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw i kitakit u satabakiaj a kitizaan nu misiwbajaj. r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw nu zuma kitizaan nu ow a kar~…ĺisiw. r~…ĺu-s…ôn-paw kitizaan nu ow a kar~…ĺisiw r~…ĺabu nu kańß…ônur~…ĺan nu t…ôk…ôdaj a ginku atu uiza dada Ē~ ° i amir~…ĺika tu ńßamin nu kitakit tu sakatus a kakaduman a giku.
